version_description: Acoustic and in a lower key.

versions.version_description: Acoustic and in a lower key.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[ch]EM9[/ch] [ch]F#/G#[/ch] [ch]G#7[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]C#m7/F#[/ch] [ch]G#m[/ch]

[ch]F#[/ch]

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]C#m9[/ch]
Bright lights, fancy restaurants[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m7[/ch]
Everything in this world that a man could want[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m9[/ch]                                           [ch]G#m7[/ch]
Got a bank account bigger than the law should allow[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m7[/ch]
Still I'm lonely now[/tab]

[tab][ch]C#m9[/ch]
Pretty faces from the covers of the magazines[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m7[/ch]                    [ch]G#m7[/ch]
From their covers to my covers wanna lay with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]
Fame and fortune still can't find[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#m7[/ch]                     [ch]F#m7/B[/ch]
Just a grown man runnin' out of time[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]EM9[/ch]
Even though it seems I have everything[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D#m7[/ch]               
I don't wanna be a lonely fool[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]EM9[/ch]
All of the women, all the expensive cars[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G#m7[/ch]
All of the money don't amount to you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]EM9[/ch]
So I can make believe I have everything[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D#m7[/ch]               [ch]G#m7[/ch]
But I can't pretend that I don't see[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C#m7[/ch]               [ch]F#7[/ch]         [ch]G#m7[/ch]     [ch]C#9[/ch]
That without you girl my life is incomplete[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C#m7[/ch]                   [ch]F#[/ch]
Said without you girl ahh[/tab]

Listen

[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]C#m9[/ch]
Your perfume, your sexy lingerie[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m7[/ch]
Girl I remember it just like it was on yesterday[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C#m9[/ch]                                  [ch]G#m7[/ch]
A Thursday you told me you had fallen in love[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G#m7[/ch]
I wasn't sure that I was[/tab]

[tab][ch]C#m9[/ch]
It's been a year, winter, summer, spring and fall[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m7[/ch]                              [ch]G#m7[/ch]
But bein' without you just ain't livin' ain't nothing at all[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C#m7[/ch]
If I could travel back in time[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F#m7[/ch]                    [ch]F#m7/B[/ch]
I'd relive the days you were mine[/tab]

[Chorus 1]

[tab]   [ch]EM9[/ch]
Even though it seems I have everything[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D#m7[/ch]              
I don't wanna be a lonely fool[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]EM9[/ch]
All of the women, all the expensive cars[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G#m7[/ch]
All of the money don't amount to you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]EM9[/ch]
So I can make believe I have everything[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D#m7[/ch]               [ch]G#m7[/ch]
But I can't pretend that I don't see[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C#m7[/ch]               [ch]F#7[/ch]         [ch]G#m7[/ch]     [ch]C#9[/ch]
That without you girl my life is incomplete[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C#m7[/ch]                   [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]F#7/E[/ch]
Said without you girl ahh[/tab]

[Bridge]

[tab]   [ch]Em7[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
I just can't help lovin' you[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]DM7[/ch]               [ch]F#m7/B[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]
But I loved you much too late[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em7[/ch]
I'd give anything[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em7[/ch]
And everything[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C#m7/F#[/ch]
To hear you say[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm7/G[/ch]
That you'll stay[/tab]

[Chorus 2]

[tab]  [ch]FM9[/ch]
Even though it seems I have everything[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em7[/ch]              
I don't wanna be a lonely fool[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]FM9[/ch]
All of the women, all the expensive cars[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am7[/ch]
All of the money don't amount to you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]FM9[/ch]
So I can make believe I have everything[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]Am7[/ch]
But I can't pretend that I don't see[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm7[/ch]               [ch]G7[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]D7[/ch]
That without you girl my life is incomplete[/tab]
     
[Chorus 3]

[tab][ch]FM9[/ch]
Even though it seems I have everything[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em7[/ch]              
I don't wanna be a lonely fool[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]FM9[/ch]
All of the women, all the expensive cars[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am7[/ch]
All of the money don't amount to you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]FM9[/ch]
So I can make believe I have everything[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]Am7[/ch]
But I can't pretend that I don't see[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm7[/ch]               [ch]G7[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]D7[/ch]
That without you girl my life is incomplete[/tab]
      
[Outro]
[tab]  [ch]D7[/ch]
without you girl[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D7[/ch]
without you girl[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]E7[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]                   [ch]D7[/ch]
Without you girl my life, my life is incomplete[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]                [ch]G7[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]
Without you girl my life is incomplete[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dm7[/ch]         [ch]G7[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Oh yeah, my life is incomplete[/tab]
N.C.
Oh yeah, yeah, yeah
